title: Update application name to Resoult

requirements.text: Update the application name from 'Local Marketplace' to 'Resoult' in the frontend HTML title tag
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title displays 'Resoult' instead of 'Local Marketplace'
The HTML title tag in frontend/index.html is updated

requirements.text: Update the navigation header branding from 'LocalMarket' to 'Resoult' in the Navigation component
acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'Resoult' as the application name
The branding text in frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx is updated

constraints: Do not modify backend code or data structures
Preserve all existing styling and layout
Do not change any immutable paths including hooks and UI components
nonGoals: Changing the project directory name or deployment configuration
Updating any backend references or actor names
Modifying copyright or footer attribution text
